title: SimpleSwap
description: Beloved by indecisive people, now you can swap out broken blocks for your block of choice!
body: Making decisions is hard. SimpleSwap lets you swap blocks fast and easily! When you break a block while holding down the Simple Swap key (default: Left Alt) the block in your hand/offhand will automatically be placed. ![A gif demonstration of SimpleSwap.](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/SimpleSwap/blob/1.21.6/assets/simpleswap.gif?raw=true) This mod may be considered cheating to some server owners. Use at your own discretion.
